mapper.select: select id, project_id, person_id, is_sign, learn_hours, learn_score, if_join_exam, is_delete, delete_time, delete_by, delete_reason, update_time, update_by, create_time, create_by, remark from xm_person_course_relate where project_id = #{projectId} and person_id = #{personId} and is_delete = 0

select b.id, b.project_name, (select count(1) from xm_project_person_study_record d where d.project_id = a.project_id and d.person_id = a.person_id) studyNum, ifnull(max(c.update_time),max(c.create_time)) studyDate, a.is_sign studyStatus from xm_person_course_relate a left join xm_project b on a.project_id = b.id left join xm_project_person_study_record c on c.project_id = a.project_id where a.is_delete = 0 and b.is_delete = 0 and c.is_delete = 0 and a.person_id = #{personId} group by b.id order by studyDate desc

select ifnull(((select count(distinct courseware_id) from xm_project_person_study_record where is_delete = 0 and status = 2 and project_id = #{projectId} and person_id = #{personId}) / (select count(distinct b.courseware_id) from xm_project_relate a left join xm_course_relation_courseware b on a.relate_ids = b.course_id left join xm_courseware z on b.courseware_id = z.id where a.is_delete = 0 and b.is_delete = 0 and z.is_delete = 0 and z.type in (1,2) and a.type = 2 and a.project_id = #{projectId}) * 100),0) count

select create_time from xm_project_person_study_record where project_id = #{projectId} and person_id = #{personId} and is_delete = 0 order by create_time
desc
limit 1

SELECT a.id AS projectId, a.project_name AS projectName, b.person_id AS personId, '已结业' AS result, IF(a.train_way = 2 OR a.train_way = 4, (DATE_FORMAT((SELECT MAX(r.create_time) FROM xm_answer_report r WHERE a.id = r.project_id AND b.person_id = r.person_id AND r.type = 2 AND r.is_delete = 0 AND r.score >= a.pass_score), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S')), (DATE_FORMAT((SELECT MAX(r.create_time) FROM xm_project_person_study_record r WHERE r.is_delete = 0 AND r.person_id = b.person_id AND r.project_id = a.id), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'))) AS timeCompletion FROM xm_project a LEFT JOIN xm_person_course_relate b ON a.id = b.project_id WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND b.is_delete = 0 AND b.person_id = #{personId} AND b.is_sign = 3 AND (a.train_way IN (1,3) OR (a.train_way IN (2,4) AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM xm_answer_report c WHERE c.is_delete = 0 AND c.type = 2 AND c.score >= a.pass_score AND c.person_id = b.person_id AND c.project_id = a.id)))
